expectations.text: Recommends <StatusChip> (or shared status component) for the running/degraded/stopped states
expectations.evidence: Component table picks <Badge> for the overall pill and a custom 'Indicator / colored div (8px circle)' for the dots. <StatusChip> is never mentioned.

expectations.text: Recommends semantic color tokens (positive/warning/negative or text-positive etc.) rather than raw Tailwind palette
expectations.evidence: Color section uses raw palette classes throughout: bg-green-50 / text-green-600 / bg-green-500, bg-yellow-50 / text-yellow-700, bg-red-50 / text-red-600, bg-neutral-100 / text-neutral-400. No semantic tokens (positive/warning/negative) appear.

expectations.text: Suggests Roboto Mono / tabular-nums / font-mono for the numeric counts
expectations.evidence: 'Tabular numerals (font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums) on every numeric token. Counts changing from 9 to 10 should not cause horizontal jitter.'

expectations.text: Treats the surface as compact (text-sm / text-xs), not a hero unit (no text-2xl/3xl/4xl)
expectations.evidence: Typography table specifies 'Headline number: text-3xl (30/36)' — a hero-sized typographic treatment despite the brief explicitly requesting a non-hero, compact card.

expectations.text: Output includes the five sections the skill specifies: layout skeleton, component choices, typography, color, copy
expectations.evidence: All five sections present (and three additional ones): Layout, Component choices, Typography, Color decisions, Copy.

expectations.text: Output does not include code blocks (the skill explicitly says no code)
expectations.evidence: No ```...``` code fences in the document; all output is prose + tables.
